== Notes for [[Item:Q88113|Q88113]] ==

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Numerius_Julius_Caesar

*Father: Lucius Julius Libo (consul 267 BC)
* `--'''Lucius Julius Libo II'''
*Son: `--Numerius Julius Caesar (b. bef. 300 BC)
*Grandson: `--Lucius Julius Caesar I

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
